## What

<!-- One sentence: what does this PR change? -->

## Why

<!-- Why is this change needed? Link the issue: Closes #123 -->

## Type

- [ ] New template (JSON in `public/templates/design-editor/`)
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI / build

## Screenshots

<!-- Required for template contributions and any visual change. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Linked issue exists (or this is a trivial fix)
- [ ] One topic per PR
- [ ] Tested locally (`docker compose up` then exercised the change)
- [ ] If you added a template, added it to `manifest.json` too
- [ ] If you touched the editor HTML, tested in Chrome + Firefox at desktop + mobile widths
- [ ] Commit message follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `docs:`, etc.)
